general_info.definition: Nitrogen doped Graphene quantum Dots dispersed in a 1-hexyl-3-methylimidazolium tryptophan ionic liquid(TryIL)

post_treatment: mixture (50.0 ml N-GQD, 0.050g NaOH, 0.050g  1-hexyl-3-methylimidazolium tryptophan(TryIL) ionic liquid)

applications.comparative_advantage: Better stability compared to developed methods

feedback.label: Bad
feedback.expert_comment: Numerical Hallucination: The correct value for carbon_dots -> properties -> optical -> emission_max was '421 nm', but the model hallucinated '2718.06 nm'. | Omission Error: The field 'carbon_dots -> properties -> optical -> excitation_max' contained '318 nm' in the source text, but it was extracted as null/missing. | Incomplete Structure: The entire section 'carbon_dots -> properties -> structural -> size' was incorrectly omitted. The JSON is missing a mandatory structural block.
